title: Italian Filo Pastry Strata with Calamarata and Delicate Cheese
description: A layered Italian-inspired dish made with flaky filo pastry, delicate cheese, and pasta. Perfect for a brunch or light lunch.

ingredients.name: Delicate cheese (e.g., ricotta or cottage cheese)

instructions: Cook the Calamarata pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, delicate cheese, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Unroll the filo pastry and cut it into 3 equal pieces.
Brush each piece of filo with olive oil and layer them on top of each other in a baking dish.
Pour the pasta mixture over the filo pastry and smooth the top.
Fold the excess filo pastry over the filling to create a neat strata.
Bake the strata in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
